segments.text: With the bracket tables each being managed at different progress stages, it's quite a challenging stage to reach the diamonds, you know?
segments.original_text: テーブルがあってその採掘テーブルがそれぞれ別の進捗状況で管理されているので なかなかねダイヤまでたどり着けないステージでもあるんですよね

full_text: With the bracket tables each being managed at different progress stages, it's quite a challenging stage to reach the diamonds, you know? Come on, go up!
